title: ED raids Karnataka Congress MLA's sons, others in crypto-linked PMLA case

title: 15 killed as bus rolls down hill in Jammu and Kashmir’s Udhampur
content: “The bus met with the accident on the hilly road while negotiating a blind curve near Kagort village in Ram Nagar area around 10 a.m.,” says the officials

title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE: Rahul to address election campaign meetings in Southern districts
content: In a major push ahead of the forthcoming elections in Tamil Nadu, Andhra CM N. Chandrababu Naidu, will embark on a two-day campaign tour in the neighbouring State, as part of the NDA’s intensified outreach

title: Ver Pattru: Caught between one’s roots and student politics

title: Confident PM Modi-President Lee talks will bolster our special strategic ties with South Korea: Jaishankar
content: The South Korean President began his three-day state visit to India on Sunday (April 19, 2026) to bolster bilateral ties in trade, defence and critical technologies

title: AIADMK looks to defend Melur and Usilampatti, its southern strongholds
content: Intra-party conflicts, which eroded the party’s core base in the southern districts, do not have much impact on these two constituencies in Madurai; while the AIADMK has won from the Melur Assembly segment five times consecutively since 2001, Usilampatti has rarely elected a DMK candidate

title: ‘Monumental setback’: Congress slams Modi govt over Pakistan’s role in U.S.-Iran peace moves

content: Besides the Gandhis, the High Court had also issued notices to Suman Dubey, Sam Pitroda, Young Indian, Dotex Merchandise Pvt. Ltd. and Sunil Bhandari on the ED’s plea

title: Temperature breaches 40°C in 5 districts of Karnataka
content: According to data from the India Meteorological Department (IMD), four districts in north interior Karnataka and one district in south interior Karnataka saw the mercury rising above the 40°C mark.

title: Fake IAS officer case: Chikkamagaluru district surgeon removed from post, DC seeks report from medical college dean
content: The person posing as an IAS officer has been arrested by Bengaluru Police, following a complaint by a medical shop owner

title: NSA Doval discusses bilateral relations, regional situation with Saudi leaders
content: Mr. Doval held meetings with Saudi Foreign Minister Faisal bin Farhan, Energy Minister Abdulaziz bin Salman and National Security Advisor Musaed Al-Aiban

title: Police reject permission for rally by youths seeking jobs in Karnataka
content: Superintendent of Police Laxman Nimbargi has said that the indefinite strike to demand filling vacancies in government departments can jeopardise life in Vijayapura

title: In Bollywood’s backyard, Marathi cinema finds a fresh voice
content: In a state dominated by big-budget Hindi films and Bollywood stars, Marathi cinema is carving out space with fresher, more rooted stories — increasingly finding younger audiences on OTT platforms. Here’s a guide to discovering them

title: 45-year-old man killed by nephew after dispute over chicken curry in Kerala’s Palakkad
content: Police say both had consumed liquor. FIR states the victim had prepared chicken curry at home which was not shared with the accused, triggering the altercation

content: Congress functionary Peter D'Souza had lodged a complaint against Mr. Khattar at Vasco police station

title: No IDs, no questions: acid flows freely in city’s neighbourhood markets
content: Ground visits by The Hindu across Delhi revealed that despite laws meant to regulate the sale of corrosive substances, acid remains easily accessible without ID proof or any inquiry into the purpose of purchase.

title: Hundreds of BJP supporters homeless in violence post TTAADC result
content: Several houses were set on fire, BJP party offices were vandalised and vehicles damaged in a series of attacks over the past two days

title: Politics is about seizing the moment, no permanent friends or foes: DMDK Virudhunagar candidate
content: Vijaya Prabhakaran said the decision to go with the DMK was taken because the party rank and file wanted it

content: Their study highlights how understanding nanoscale molecular behaviour can influence the design of next-generation functional materials

title: Ashok Kharat remanded to police custody till April 23
content: Kharat was arrested on March 18 after a 35-year-old woman filed a rape complaint at the Sarkarwada police station

title: NMC proposes to ease norms for establishing medical college, tighten PG education standards
content: The National Medical Commission in its proposed amendments to the “Registration of Medical Practitioners and Licence to Practice Medicine (Amendment), Regulations 2026” has also mooted the idea of introducing a single-State licence for Armed Forces Medical Services (AFMS) doctors to practice across the country

title: Woman complains that in-laws killed her daughter in Belagavi district
content: The deceased had come back to her maternal home, and complained of cruel treatment by her husband and in-laws.

title: On delimitation and Parliament seats | Explained
content: What is delimitation, and how does it work in India? What changes were proposed in the 131st Constitutional Amendment Bill? Why was an increase in Lok Sabha seats proposed? What concerns did the Opposition raise against the Bills? What is the way forward?

title: Pardeshi receives honour from Dr. Date at Jnana Prabodhini Competitive Examination Centre’s 30th anniversary
content: Dr. Pardeshi, in his address, spoke about his work in student verification, campaigns against illegal construction, projects during the COVID-19 period, and training of administrative staff

title: Women’s Bill being used to dilute southern representation, says Kanimozhi
content: Campaigning for M. H. Jawahirullah, candidate of the DMK-led alliance from Nagapattinam, she addressed voters near Nellukadai Mariamman Temple and sought support for the alliance

title: PM Modi’s jhalmuri break in Jhargram leaves Trinamool fuming
content: Jharkhand Chief Minister Hemant Soren and his wife Kalpana Soren had to return after waiting for hours to campaign in Jhargram as they were not allowed to land, the party says

title: Five deaths, no arrests as fresh violence grips Manipur
content: As the attackers remain unidentified, locals have hit the streets multiple times in the past one week and have clashed with security forces demanding arrests

title: Arrests in Noida workers’ protests ‘illegal’, say activists
content: “Mass detentions without presenting grounds for arrest or copies of FIRs, and the failure to name specific persons in the FIRs, are among the illegal means through which the police have acted,” said an advocate

title: 23 killed in explosion at fireworks unit near Virudhunagar
content: Most victims charred beyond recognition, with many bodies blown away by the impact of the explosion; the fireworks industry is shut on Sundays, but the unit was operating without permission, Virudhunagar Collector N.O. Sukhaputra

title: Congress committed to 33% quota for women: Sharmila
content: Sharmila accused the Central Government of linking the issue with delimitation for political gain, and described the Prime Minister as an “opportunist”

title: West Bengal BJP leader Dinesh Trivedi expected to be new Indian envoy to Bangladesh
content: The timing of appointment is crucial as Bangladesh’s new government needs support to deal with acute energy crisis that has erupted in the country because of U.S.-Israel war on Iran and the Iranian chokehold of the Strait of Hormuz

title: Diplomats’ families and students fleeing Iran return to India
content: Amidst tenuous ceasefire between Iran and U.S., groups undertake gruelling journeys to cross over into Azerbaijan and Armenia

title: Sudden rain, hailstorm bring relief from heat in Hyderabad
content: The weather shifted abruptly after 4 p.m., when clear skies gave way to dense cloud cover, followed by thunder and gusty winds

title: Waiting for another take-off: Dealing with U.P.’s stalled airports
content: Over the past few years, several airports have been inaugurated across second- and third-tier cities of Uttar Pradesh to boost regional connectivity. However, operations at a number of these have been discontinued within weeks of launch, prompting questions over planning, viability and the gap between infrastructure expansion and sustained services

title: Southern States’ combined representation will increase from 23.76% to 23.90% in LS after delimitation, says Anurag Thakur
content: Mr. Thakur condemned the Congress, TMC, DMK, and the Samajwadi Party for blocking the passage of the Constitution Amendment Bill

title: Forecast of rain, winds in parts of Maharashtra from April 20
content: After days of high temperature, the Chief Minister’s Office said in a tweet that weather patterns are likely to change in many parts of Maharashtra over the coming days

title: We know how to bring debt under control, improve finances of Tamil Nadu: Edappadi Palaniswami
content: On delimitation, the Union Minister for Home Affairs has clarified that not only Tamil Nadu but other States also will not be affected. I have also reiterated it. Tamil Nadu’s share will go up from 7.18% to 7.23%. This has disproved what Mr. Stalin has been saying: Edapaddi K. Palaniswami

title: Will pendulum effect hold true for Krishnagiri constituency this election?
content: Krishnagiri has consistenty oscillated between the DMK and AIADMK in hustings since 1984, with the incumbent being an AIADMK MLA; the challenger this time around is from Congress; lack of rail connectivity, grievances of mango farmers and a toll plaza in the wrong place are some of the issues the electorate seeks answers to

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Pattas, startups and safety top priority in Saidapet, says TVK’s Arul Prakasam
content: There is recognition and affection for Thalapathy [C. Joseph Vijay] and people are clearly looking for a change, and so, a 100% victory is certain, he said.

title: South stood united, made its voice heard and democracy prevailed: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin
content: M.K. Stalin says he ‘never opposed’ delimitation and always sought ‘fairness’ in a process that is ‘thought through’ and not pushed for ‘political gain’; he says women will ‘see through’ the BJP’s ‘optics’

title: Trump kept out of war room, 'screamed at aides': What happened after US jet crashed in Iran
content: A US jet downed over Iran caused turmoil in the White House. President Donald Trump pushed for immediate rescue of two missing airmen. Officials planned a complex mission to retrieve them from Iranian territory. One airman was quickly recovered. The second was rescued after over 24 hours behind enemy lines. This averted a major setback for the administration.

title: 15 dead, several injured as bus falls into gorge in J&K’s Udhampur
content: A devastating bus accident in Udhampur, Jammu and Kashmir, claimed at least seven lives and left several injured as the vehicle plunged into a gorge. Rescue operations are underway, with authorities confirming heavy casualties are anticipated. Efforts are being made to provide medical aid and airlift critically wounded passengers.

title: Angry over 'no invite', politician damages cricket pitch with tractor — Watch
content: A local politician, reportedly upset over not being invited to a cricket tournament's final, drove a tractor onto the pitch in Dharangaon, India, and vandalized it. The shocking incident, captured on video, rendered the field unplayable, forcing the match to be called off. While police intervened, organisers opted not to file a formal complaint.

title: ED raids premises of Karnataka Cong MLA’s sons, others in money laundering case
content: Enforcement Directorate officials conducted raids across Bengaluru on Monday, targeting premises linked to the sons of Karnataka Congress MLA N A Harris, Mohammed Haris Nalapad and Omar Farook Nalapad. The searches are part of a money laundering investigation connected to a 2017 cryptocurrency case involving alleged bitcoin theft by hacker Srikrishna Ramesh alias Sriki.

title: Anthropic CEO 'knows absolutely nothing' about AI effects on jobs, says godfather of AI
content: AI expert Yann LeCun disagrees with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's forecast of AI eliminating many entry-level jobs. LeCun suggests economists are better equipped to analyze technological impacts on employment. Amodei previously warned AI could replace a significant portion of white-collar roles within five years, calling AI a general labor substitute.

title: Yuan for oil payments? UAE seeks US safety net amid Iran war - report
content: The UAE has requested a US financial safety net amid concerns that an Iran war could severely damage its economy and investor confidence. Talks included a currency-swap line proposal, as the UAE fears needing to use other currencies for transactions if dollar shortages arise.

title: IPL: Will Rohit Sharma play vs GT today? MI coach drops big fitness update
content: Mumbai Indians received a positive update on Rohit Sharma's fitness ahead of their IPL 2026 clash against Gujarat Titans on Monday. Coach Paras Mhambrey confirmed Rohit is fit and batting in the nets, though a final decision on his participation is pending. His return could be crucial for MI's struggling campaign.

title: Amazon internal document reportedly points to an 'AI mess'
content: Amazon's rapid AI adoption is creating a significant internal infrastructure problem, leading to a surge of duplicate tools and orphaned data. The company's decentralized structure exacerbates this issue, as autonomous teams build independently without checking for existing solutions. This results in a growing, unmanageable mess of redundant systems and persistent derived data, even after original sources are removed.

title: Gold price prediction today: Will gold prices rise this week? Key levels to watch out for
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are expected to continue being volatile in the coming days on uncertainty related to the US-Iran war and inflation data this week, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' BO collection day 3: Akshay Kumar's film misses Rs 100cr mark
content: Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla' is a box office hit, surpassing 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' and earning Rs 58 crore net in India by Sunday. Despite mixed critical reviews, the horror-comedy's humor and unique plot have resonated with audiences. The film, directed by Priyadarshan, also marks a reunion after 16 years and is the late Asrani's final film. Read on to know more in detail.

title: ‘Chinese Humanoid Robots’ beat ​humans in half-marathon race
content: Chinese robots dominated a Beijing half-marathon on Sunday. These machines not only broke last year's record but also finished ahead of human runners. This performance highlights China's swift progress in AI and robotics. Engineers developed these robots to mimic elite human athletes, using advanced cooling technology. The goal is to prove their durability for future factory work.

title: 'Bengal will remember': TMC jabs PM Modi over 'jhalmuri break', claims Jharkhand CM had to return
content: Trinamool Congress criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi for his jhalmuri break in Jhargram, alleging it caused Jharkhand CM Hemant Soren to be denied chopper landing and return without campaigning for Mamata Banerjee. The party accused Modi of displaying an anti-Adivasi mindset and humiliating elected leaders, claiming his actions prioritized photo opportunities over democratic rights.

title: India's 150kmph bowling hope still lives in village without roads - Inside Ashok's dream
content: Ashok Sharma is being touted as the next big thing from India's fast bowling stable. But in his village, Rampura, on the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway, around 35 km from Rajasthan's capital Jaipur, his family speaks about his biggest dream -- the blue jersey. Ashok Sharma has picked up six wickets in five matches this season so far for Gujarat Titans.

title: Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld step out glowing after welcoming their first child
content: NFL star Josh Allen and actress Hailee Steinfeld welcomed their baby daughter, sharing the joyous news on Thursday. Just a day later, the new parents made a dazzling appearance at Josh's best friend Sam Darnold's wedding. The couple, radiating happiness, celebrated with fellow NFL players, even sharing baby photos, proving they can balance new parenthood with social commitments.

title: Aryna Sabalenka’s fiancé Georgios Frangulis hits back at critics over match presence
content: Georgios Frangulis responded strongly to critics questioning his presence at Aryna Sabalenka’s matches. In a podcast video, he explained how he balances work and support for his fiancé. Sabalenka also shared how the relationship has shaped her mindset. Meanwhile, she continues a strong tennis season despite a recent injury forcing her to miss the Stuttgart Open.

title: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce plan wedding move amid security concerns
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are gearing up to get married after being together for close to three years now. While Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have been rumored to be tying the knot on 3rd July in New York City, details have been kept private. Amid all this, it seems the high profile couple is focused on giving back to society.

title: KL Rahul's long-standing record shattered! Priyansh Arya creates history
content: Priyansh Arya smashed a blistering 93 off 37 balls against Lucknow Super Giants. His innings powered Punjab Kings to a massive 254/7. Punjab Kings successfully defended the total, restricting LSG to 200/5. Arya's performance earned him Player of the Match. This win keeps Punjab Kings at the top of the table.

title: 'I have killed my children': Haunting call made by UP man after slitting throats of two daughters
content: A father in Kanpur allegedly strangled and slit the throats of his 11-year-old twin daughters after sedating them. The pharmaceutical businessman was arrested after reporting the crime himself. Police suspect mental stress, depression, and financial problems as motives for the horrific act.

title: ‘Rs 37 lakh cash, gold, silver seized’: CBI arrests DGCA deputy director general in bribery case
content: The CBI has arrested a senior DGCA official and a private company representative for allegedly accepting a bribe of Rs 2.5 lakhs. The official, a deputy director general, was accused of demanding undue advantage for issuing approvals. Searches at four locations led to the seizure of Rs 37 lakhs in cash, gold, silver coins, and digital devices.

title: 'Blockade main obstacle': Iran rejects second round of talks with US in Pakistan
content: Iran has rejected further peace talks with the United States, citing excessive demands, shifting positions, and ongoing naval confrontations. Tehran blames Washington's "coercive measures," including a naval blockade and recent maritime incidents, for the breakdown in diplomacy and a negative atmosphere for negotiations.

title: Watch: Moment US Navy intercepts Iranian cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
content: The US Navy intercepted and boarded an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel, the TOUSKA, in the Gulf of Oman after it ignored warnings and attempted to bypass a blockade. The USS Spruance disabled the ship's propulsion, and US Marines took custody. In retaliation, Iran launched drones towards US warships.

title: 'Mai match chheen sakta hoon': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's bold warning
content: Young batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is continuing his fiery form in IPL 2026, becoming Rajasthan Royals' highest run-getter with 246 runs in 6 matches at a strike rate of 236.54. The 15-year-old aims to contribute to the senior Indian team after fulfilling his father's dream of playing in the World Cup.

title: ‘Attacked with beer bottles': 17-year-old killed by uncle over ‘affair’ with wife
content: A shocking incident unfolded near Pamurayi village where a 17-year-old student was brutally murdered by his uncle. Driven by suspicion of an illicit affair with his wife, the uncle allegedly lured the boy to an isolated factory. Following a heated argument, the enraged uncle attacked the teenager with beer bottles and cement bricks, leading to his death.

title: Stock market today: Nifty50 opens below 24,300; Sensex down over 200 points
content: Stock market today: Sensex and Nifty opened in red on Monday on weak global cues as the closure of Strait of Hormuz led to an increase in oil prices. However the market quickly revered losses to move in green territory.

title: Nagpur NGO chief accused of sex abuse, religious coercion of several young women
content: An NGO president in Nagpur was arrested for allegedly sexually abusing young women, religious coercion, defamation, and cyberstalking. The FIR details multiple incidents of harassment, including unwanted advances and monitoring staff. Intelligence agencies are now investigating the NGO's background and finances.

title: Muzarabani PSL ban: PCB admits ‘no contract’ but stands firm on punishment
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board acknowledged no formal contract was sent to Blessing Muzarabani for the PSL but defended his two-year ban, citing a verbal agreement. Muzarabani's agent refuted this, stating a contract is needed for an NOC, and called the ban excessive. The dispute arose after Muzarabani opted for the IPL over the PSL.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for April 20 week - check list
content: ​Stock market recommendations: Bharat Electronics, and MTAR Technologies are the top stock recommendations by Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk for this trading week starting April 20, 2026. The brokerage shares the target prices and rationale.

title: South Korea working with India to secure Hormuz: President Lee Jae Myung
content: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung emphasized close collaboration with India as emerging global leaders amidst geopolitical uncertainty. He highlighted shared values and complementary economies, advocating for upgraded trade agreements, defense industrial cooperation, and joint ventures in critical minerals and shipbuilding to foster mutual growth and innovation.

title: Afghanistan's Rashid Khan was offered Indian citizenship; here's how he responded
content: In Rashid Khan: From Streets to Stardom, set to be released on Monday, Rashid told author Mohammad Haand Jafar that both India and Australia made such offers.

title: 'My bat is the prize': Shreyas Iyer reveals dressing-room contest
content: Punjab Kings secured a dominant 54-run victory over Lucknow Super Giants, propelling them to the top of the table. Captain Shreyas Iyer revealed a light-hearted six-hitting contest in the dressing room fueled the team's batting prowess, with Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly smashing centuries to post a season-high 254/7.

title: 32-year-old businessman clicking wife’s pic on cable bridge dies after Mercedes rams him
content: A 32-year-old businessman tragically lost his life after being struck by a speeding Mercedes on the Durgam Cheruvu cable bridge early Sunday. The unidentified driver, whose West Bengal-registered car flipped after hitting the railing, abandoned the vehicle and fled the scene. The victim was reportedly taking pictures of his wife when the accident occurred.

title: 23 dead, 6 injured in massive blast at Tamil Nadu firecracker unit
content: In a tragic incident, a firecracker factory in Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu witnessed a catastrophic explosion that resulted in the loss of 23 lives and left six workers wounded. Preliminary investigations suggest that chemical friction may have triggered the blast, which obliterated several structures within the factory.

title: Heatwave alert: Mercury may touch 43°C this week in Delhi
content: Delhi's mercury is rising again, with temperatures expected to reach 43°C and a yellow alert issued for heatwave conditions from Wednesday to Friday. Despite recent rain, consistently hot winds and prolonged sunshine will push temperatures up, posing moderate health concerns for vulnerable groups.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO collection day 32: Ranveer Singh starrer crashes with Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla'
content: Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge is experiencing a slowdown in its fifth week, with new release Bhooth Bangla impacting collections. Despite a dip, the film added Rs 12.55 crore over the weekend, pushing its net India total to Rs 1,115.67 crore. Globally, it has grossed an estimated Rs 1,756.64 crore, nearing Baahubali 2's record.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Mannargudi constituency set for a tight contest
content: A predominantly agrarian, the constituency in the heart of the Cauvery delta, continues to suffer from a lack of infrastructure, with several panchayats still without proper link roads, complicating the movement of produce and isolating villages.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Two-cornered contest in Vepanahalli constituency
content: Vepanahalli is primarily agrarian with horticultural cropping. Parts of Shoolagiri and Udhanapalli are facing imminent land alienation with notification of lands for establishment of SIPCOT industrial estates, given its proximity to Hosur’s industrial ecosystem.

title: WrestleMania 42 Night 2 takeaways: Will Reigns make this title run alone?
content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: Wemby tops Duncan with 35 in Spurs playoff debut
content: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night.

title: Sabres surge in 3rd for 1st playoff win in 15 years
content: Buffalo overcame a two-goal deficit in the final eight minutes to beat the Bruins 4-3 on Sunday night in the Sabres' first playoff game in 15 years.

title: OK State lands top transfer Crooks from ISU
content: Former Iowa State center Audi Crooks, No. 1 in ESPN's women's basketball transfer rankings, committed to Oklahoma State, she announced Sunday night.

title: 'We belong here': Magic stun Pistons in Game 1
content: The Magic showed an intensity and fight that had been missing for most of the season as they stunned No. 1 seed Detroit in Game 1 of their series.

title: Cooper: Penalty 'stupidity' cost Lightning in G1
content: Lightning coach Jon Cooper was not happy with the penalties his team committed in its Game 1 overtime loss to the Canadiens on Sunday.

title: Bengals extend Lawrence after blockbuster trade
content: Defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II passed his physical with the Bengals and signed a one-year, $28 million extension, the Win Sports Group told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Indiana DC claps back at Simpson, Alabama fans
content: Indiana defensive coordinator Bryant Haines heard the comments from former Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson about the teams' matchup last season in the Rose Bowl and responded with his own observations.

title: 'Gonna get loud': Mets head home as skid hits 11
content: Nico Hoerner hit a sacrifice fly off Craig Kimbrel in the 10th inning as the Cubs extended the Mets' losing streak to 11 games by rallying for a 2-1 victory.

title: 🏈 Kiper: Favorites from this year's NFL draft class
content: Mel Kiper Jr.'s annual list of NFL draft favorites includes two speedy receivers, three undersized cornerbacks and some gritty linemen.

title: 'Nobody was going to beat the 10th pick:' How the Bengals wooed the Giants into trading vet Dexter Lawrence
content: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.

title: Women's transfer rankings: No. 1 Audi Crooks commits to Oklahoma State
content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: Hannah Green wins third LA Championship in four years
content: Hannah Green won the JM Eagle LA Championship on Sunday for the third time in our years and the first at El Caballero.

title: At a crucial stage in the season, Man City take control of the title race over Arsenal
content: Manchester City's 2-1 win over Arsenal becomes a huge confidence boost for Pep Guardiola's side in the Premier League title race.

title: Van Dijk hands Liverpool a UCL boost and reason to believe after more late drama
content: Liverpool won with a late goal to go seven points clear of Chelsea in the race for the Champions League.

title: Tyler Reddick rolls in OT, wins fifth Cup Series race
content: Tyler Reddick became just the fourth driver to win five of the first nine NASCAR Cup Series races in a season, and the first since Dale Earnhardt nearly four decades ago, when he passed Kyle Larson on the final lap of overtime at Kansas Speedway Sunday.

title: Postseason preview: Matchups, biggest questions and what to know
content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

content: With eight picks in the first and second rounds, New York sits where the former Cowboys coach was 35 years ago.

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Jon Rahm wins in Mexico, capping wild week for LIV
content: Jon Rahm capped off a chaotic week on LIV Golf when he closed with a 7-under 64 on Sunday for a six-shot victory in LIV Golf Mexico City.

content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern, Madrid in race to sign Tottenham's Sarr
content: Both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid are competing to sign Tottenham midfielder Pape Matar Sarr. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Passengers Pray, Break Down In Tears During Fly91 Flight's Mid-Air Scare
content: A flight lost control due to a sudden technical fault, leaving passengers in panic for nearly four hours mid-air.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Pakistan Is Juggling Blackouts And Iran Diplomacy
content: Pakistan is witnessing hours of power cuts driven by poor decision-making of the government officials and not the war in the Gulf alone.

title: "Karera Tere Daddy Ka Hai?" BJP MLA Shouts At Cop After Son's Thar Hits Five
content: In an aggressive and unfiltered attack on the police, BJP MLA Pritam Lodhi lashed out at Karera Sub-Divisional Officer of Police, issuing a direct warning.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Toughest Opponent? His Own Economy
content: Average tax refunds are up only about $350, or 11%, over last year, according to the Treasury Department. That's far lower than the original projections of nearly $1,000.

title: Tamil Nadu Factory Blast: Probe Finds Safety Lapses, 20 Workers In Room Meant For 4
content: At least 23 workers were killed when the explosion ripped through multiple sheds in the facility, flattening structures and leaving several others critically injured.

title: Woman Dies After Falling Into Open Drain Amid Heavy Rain In Assam
content: The woman, identified as Payel Nath, reportedly slipped and fell into the drain before going missing, causing panic among local residents.

title: DMK Deploys Kamal Haasan Against TVK's Vijay In High-Stakes Chennai Battle
content: Kamal Haasan campaigns for DMK's Senthil Balaji in Coimbatore East amid a star-driven Tamil Nadu election battle.

title: Video: US Navy Boards Iran-Flagged Ship In 1st Seizure Amid Hormuz Blockade
content: Donald Trump said the US forces gave "fair warning" to the ship to stop, which was ignored, "so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engine room."

title: US Man Goes On Shooting Rampage, Kills 8 Children, 7 Were His Own
content: The early morning massacre at a gray house in the city of Shreveport was the deadliest mass shooting in the United States in more than two years, according to data from the Gun Violence Archive.

title: 'Vibes All the Way Down': Iran's Jibe At Safe-Haven Tag For US Bonds
content: Treasuries are priced mostly on market psychology, not something as tangible as barrels of oil, said Iran's Parliament Speaker.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says US Seized Iranian‑Flagged Ship Near Hormuz, Tehran Vows Response
content: US-Iran War, Ceasefire, Peace Talks Updates: The war is in its eighth week and has sent oil prices surging because of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
